title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM discusses how AI accelerates the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities in cybersecurity. The video explains AI-driven vulnerability scanning and its impact on defense strategies and DevSecOps practices.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI speeds up the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities and what that shift means for cybersecurity defense. The video covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning and its effect on defense strategies and DevSecOps practices. The central takeaway: AI compresses the time needed to surface unknown flaws, which reshapes how security teams scan, prioritize, and integrate defenses into development workflows.
